'''√zh-p-n''' ('''zhapana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinofacture|machinofacture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinofacture|machinofacture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √zh-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| zhapana
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || zhapanithi || zhapaniji || zhapanishi || zhapani
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || zhapanuthuth || zhapanujuj || zhapanushush || zhapan
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || zhapanuthu || zhapanuju || zhapanushu || zhapanu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || zhapanufuth || zhapanufuj || zhapanufush || zhapanuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zhapanethe || zhapaneje || zhapaneshe || zhapane
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zhapanothoth || zhapanojoj || zhapanoshosh || zhapan
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zhapanotho || zhapanojo || zhapanosho || zhapano
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zhapanofoth || zhapanofoj || zhapanofosh || zhapanof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zhapanïf || zhapanïf || zhapanïf || zhapanïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zhapanïfïf || zhapanïfïf || zhapanïfïf || zhapanïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zhapanïf || zhapanïf || zhapanïf || zhapanïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zhapanïf || zhapanïf || zhapanïf || zhapanïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zhapanæthæ || zhapanæjæ || zhapanæshæ || zhapanæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zhapanathath || zhapanajaj || zhapanashash || zhapan
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zhapanatha || zhapanaja || zhapanasha || zhapana
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zhapanafath || zhapanafaj || zhapanafash || zhapanaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || zhapanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gozhapanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokizhapanasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || zhapannüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gozhapannknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokizhapannüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || zhapanshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gozhapannkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokizhapanshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || zhapanroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gozhapannkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokizhapanroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || zhapanmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gozhapannkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokizhapanmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || zhapansherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gozhapannksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokizhapansherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || zhapanngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gozhapannkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokizhapanngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || zhapanyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gozhapannkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokizhapanyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || zhapanyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gozhapannkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokizhapanyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || zhapannüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gozhapannknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokizhapannüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || zhapannüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gozhapannknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokizhapannüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || zhapannümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gozhapannknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokizhapannümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || zhapanshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gozhapannkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokizhapanshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || zhapanshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gozhapannkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokizhapanshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || zhapanshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gozhapannkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokizhapanshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || zhapanronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gozhapannkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokizhapanronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || zhapanroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gozhapannkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokizhapanroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || zhapanromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gozhapannkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokizhapanromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || zhapanmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gozhapannkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokizhapanmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || zhapanmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gozhapannkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokizhapanmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || zhapanmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gozhapannkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokizhapanmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || zhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || zhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hozhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hozhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohozhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohozhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüzhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüzhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüzhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüzhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïzhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïzhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïzhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïzhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luzhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luzhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluzhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluzhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lizhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lizhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilizhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilizhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kozhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kozhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokozhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokozhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kezhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kezhæpæn
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekezhapan
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekezhæpæn
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
